state_snapshot.overall_goal: Finalize AliceGeminiClient with TLS support, API key fallback, and corrected depth linearization.
state_snapshot.active_constraints: - SECURITY: Gemini API key fallback implemented (UI -> ENV -> Hardcoded for test). - NETWORKING: Force-rebuilt cpp-httplib with "schannel" for TLS support. - RENDERING: Corrected depth linearization (Black = Near, White = Far/Background).
state_snapshot.key_knowledge: - TLS Fix: Scheme 'https' failure was due to cached non-TLS binary. Nuking 'build/' and regenerating with explicit LLVM MT/RC paths solved the configuration and linkage issues. - Depth Mapping: Background is now clamped to 0.9999f (Solid White) to prevent linearization artifacts on infinite backgrounds. Near-field mapping (0-100 units) is linear 0-255 (Black-to-White). - Toolchain: Successfully bypassed MSVC 'mt.exe' by using 'llvm-mt.exe' and 'llvm-rc.exe' during CMake configuration on Windows.
state_snapshot.artifact_trail: - `include/AliceGeminiClient.h`: - Updated `workerThreadFunc` with API key fallback logic. - Replaced depth linearization loop with standard near/far mapping and background clamp. - `build/bin/AliceViewer.exe`: Compiled successfully with LLVM/clang-cl (Ninja).
state_snapshot.recent_actions: - Nuked `./build/` directory. - Regenerated CMake with `-DCMAKE_MT` and `-DCMAKE_RC_COMPILER` pointing to LLVM. - Implemented hardcoded API key fallback for unit testing. - Fixed depth map linearization logic. - Verified 0-error build via Ninja.
state_snapshot.task_state: 1. [DONE] Nuke build cache and force TLS rebuild. 2. [DONE] Implement API key fallback (UI/ENV/Hardcoded). 3. [DONE] Fix depth map linearization and background clamping. 4. [DONE] Verify local build (0 errors).
